signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.description: Log in to manage your ideas, scripts, and scenes.

signUp.title: Join Klipix
signUp.description: Create your account to start organizing your content pipeline.

landing.subtitle: Built for short-form creators
landing.headline: Turn ideas into published shorts without the chaos.
landing.description: Klipix keeps your entire content pipeline playful, visible, and moving. Capture ideas, build scripts, and ship consistently—all in one joyful space.
landing.cardDesc2: Capture ideas in seconds, then promote them into full projects.
landing.coreDesc: Everything you need to manage your content pipeline
landing.ideaDesc: Capture sparks fast and turn them into structured projects. Never lose a creative moment again.
landing.scriptDesc: Draft, split, and schedule scenes with clear next steps. Organize your creative process effortlessly.
landing.publishDesc: Track status from idea → script → edit → posted. Stay on top of everything that matters.
landing.whyDesc: Packed with features designed for your workflow
landing.multiDesc: Post to TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts—all from one dashboard.
landing.dragDesc: Reorder, organize, and visualize your content pipeline with intuitive drag-and-drop.
landing.realDesc: Keep your workflow visible and moving. Track every step of your pipeline.
landing.scriptLibDesc: Save scripts and reuse templates. Build a growing library of your best work.
landing.deadlineDesc: Never miss a posting date. Smart reminders keep you on schedule.
landing.playfulDesc: Content creation should be fun. Enjoy a delightful, energetic interface.
landing.pipelineDesc: From idea to published in four simple steps
landing.builtDesc: Real creators, real results—see the impact of organized creativity
landing.whatSayDesc: Join the community transforming their workflow
landing.quote1: Klipix saved me 5 hours per week.
landing.quote2: Finally a tool that gets the creative process.
landing.quote3: Our content pipeline is 10x more organized.
landing.readyOrganize: Ready to organize your creative chaos?
landing.readyDesc: Join creators who've transformed their content pipeline into a joy-filled workflow.
landing.noCreditCard: No credit card required • Start free
